name: Chocolate Mayo Cake- Mom Wolf
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Grease a 9-inch circular pan.
Mix the first four ingredients and set aside.
Beat the next three ingredients for three minutes or until fluffy.
Add mayonnaise, then flour, alternating with water.
Pour into pans.
Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes.
Cool in the pan for 10 minutes. Remove and cool on a wire rack.
Icing or dusting with powdered sugar on top of the cake.
